mdRecord.dcterms:title: C. K. Meredith to William M. Meredith, February 5, [1865]
mdRecord.dcterms:description: C. K. Meredith to William M. Meredith from Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, discussing Gertrude's return with James C. Biddle, news of acquaintances, and a complimentary notice of General Meade in the Army and Navy Journal.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2115
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Meredith, C. K.
